ADDS + DNS + DHCP

div.div:
Inbound blocked:
home devices
cannot reach the lab

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 738px; height: 1px; padding-top: 592px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666666;

div.div: The lab VMs share one private network. They can reach the internet through NAT, but nothing on the home network can start a connection into the lab.
